mapper.select: select sp.sys_id , sp.plant_cd , sp2.plant_nm , sp.payment_cd , sp.payment_nm , sp.payment_fee , sp.payment_fee_unit , sp.license_valid_month from sys_payment sp left join sys_plant sp2 on sp2.plant_cd = sp.plant_nm where 1=1 and (sp.user_id like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') or sp.user_nm like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')) and sp.delete_yn = 'N' and sp2.delete_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: insert into sys_payment ( sys_id, plant_cd, payment_cd , payment_nm , payment_fee , payment_fee_unit , license_valid_month , insert_user_id, insert_datetime, sys_plant_cd ) values ( #{payment.sysId}, #{payment.plantCd}, #{payment.paymentCd}, #{payment.paymentNm}, #{payment.paymentFee}, #{payment.paymentFeeUnit}, #{payment.licenseValidMonth}, #{userId}, now(), #{payment.sysPlantCd} )
mapper.update: update sys_payment set payment_nm = #{payment.paymentNm}, payment_fee = #{payment.paymentFee}, payment_fee_unit = #{payment.paymentFeeUnit}, license_valid_month = #{payment.licenseValidMonth}, modify_user_id = #{userId}, modify_datetime = now() where 1=1 and sys_id = #{payment.sysId}
mapper.delete: update sys_payment set delete_yn = 'Y', modify_user_id = #{userId}, modify_datetime = now() where 1=1 and sys_id = #{payment.sysId}
mapper.select: select count(*) > 0 from sys_payment where 1=1 and payment_cd = #{payment.paymentCd}
select count(*) > 0 from sys_plant_pay_info where 1=1 and payment_cd = #{payment.paymentCd}
